title: Cuneiform Tablet #0372: Middle Assyrian Loan Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Assyrian period. Loan Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records loan contract matters typical of Middle Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
